other_observers: Nick Moore, Ali Iyoob, Matt Daw, Joel Such, David Such, Renee Haip; We were the original finders
specific_location: Random pull-off of Highway 6 in Clear Creek Canyon (Lat 39.736215, Long -105.386840)
description: Mid-sized. Bill pale yellowish and shortish, thick and stout in structure. Overall rose-red with dingy yellow highlights. Wings yellow-green with dark gray centers of feathers. Eye dark.Behaviors: Sat in tree calling repeatedly. After a few minutes it flew down canyon.Call: Call a coarse "biduk", given every few seconds. No other calls given.Plumage: immature
